name: Vocab Quiz (Google Sheets)
description: Vocabulary quiz that pulls flashcard decks from Google Sheets. Teachers create decks in Sheets, students study them here with AI tutoring.

tools.name: authorize_google
tools.description: Connect the student's Google account so the app can read shared Google Sheets. Must be called before load_deck.

tools.name: load_deck
tools.description: Load a flashcard deck from a Google Sheet. The sheet should have columns: Term, Definition, and optionally Hint. Pass the sheet URL or ID.

sheetUrl.description: Google Sheets URL or spreadsheet ID

tools.name: check_answer
tools.description: Check a student's answer against the current flashcard. Returns whether correct, the right answer, and any hint.

tools.name: get_score
tools.description: Get the student's current quiz score and which terms they got right/wrong.
